I need to understand how chat template handlers are implemented in llama.cpp. Please:

1. Find the main chat template implementation file(s) - likely something like chat.cpp, chat-template.cpp, or similar

input.description: Explore Mistral template format and detection logic

I need to understand how template auto-detection works in llama.cpp for chat templates. Please:

3. Find any template detection logic (likely searches model names or jinja template strings)
4. Look for "ministral" or "mistral" in any template-related code
5. Find where templates are registered or mapped to names
6. Look at how the auto-detection distinguishes between different template formats
7. Search in directories like: src/, common/, examples/, include/

Show me file paths and relevant code snippets with line numbers.
